samples.title: Butter Chicken With Rice
steps: Cut chicken into bite size pieces
Add tomato sauce, cumin and chili powder and cook 10 minutes
samples.formatted:
Butter Chicken With Rice

Ingredients:
- chicken breast
- butter
- onion
- garlic
- ginger
- tomato sauce
- garam masala
- cumin
- chili powder
- heavy cream
- salt
- cilantro
- cooked rice

Instructions:
1. Cut chicken into bite size pieces
2. Season with salt
3. In large skillet melt butter
4. Saute onion, garlic and ginger
5. Simmer 15 minutes
6. Add chicken pieces
7. Add tomato sauce, cumin and chili powder and cook 10 minutes
8. Add cream mixture
9. Cook 5 minutes
10. Serve over rice rice

samples.title: Butter Chicken With Rice
steps: Cut chicken into bite size pieces
Saute onion in butter until tender
Add garlic and ginger and stir well
Stir in tomato sauce and spices
Simmer 30 minutes or until chicken is tender
Add rice and cream until mixture
